visual_description: A woman with brown hair lies in a hospital bed, wearing a white gown and covered with a pink blanket. A man in a light-colored jacket stands beside her, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. The woman raises her hands to her head, then lowers them and looks at the man with a concerned expression.
audio_description: A man speaks in a calm, reassuring tone. A woman sighs and then speaks in a concerned tone. The audio is clear and easy to understand.
